{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Medical Sales Representative",
  "description": "Nemitt Pharmaceuticals Limited is an indigenous pharmaceutical company incorporated in July 1988 as a fully capitalized limited liability company with RC no 116 088 to among other activities, engage in the wholesale of Pharmaceutical products. Nemitt Pharmaceuticals Limited was born out of the dire need for an alternative to the hitherto existing chaotic distribution in the pharmaceutical supply chain. with the goal of addressing the gaps in the distribution value chain.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sales Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We&rsquo;re looking for a results-driven Medical Sales Representative to drive product awareness, build strong client relationships, and grow sales across assigned territories. This is a job for Lagos residents.


Responsibilities


	Promote products to doctors, pharmacists, and healthcare providers.
	Manage orders, invoicing, and payment follow-ups.
	Drive product visibility across hospitals and pharmacies.
	Track market trends and competitor activity.
	Prepare and submit regular reports.
	Territory mappings ( Island and Mainland)


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a degree in sciences(Microbiology, Biochemistry, or related courses).
	1-3 years of work experience in Pharma sales or FMCG is advantageous.
	Strong communication and sales skills
	Proven ability to build relationships and close deals.
	Detail-oriented with basic computer skills.
	Knowledge of Lagos as a territory ( Island &amp; Mainland)
	Candidates must reside in Lagos. If you do not reside in Lagos, do not apply
	Monthly float will also be provided.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrnemitt@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-29",

Medical Sales Representative Job at Nemitt Pharmaceuticals Limited




        
    

        
        Nemitt Pharmaceuticals Limited is an indigenous pharmaceutical company incorporated in July 1988 as a fully capitalized limited liability company with RC no 116 088 to among other activities, engage in the wholesale of Pharmaceutical products. Nemitt Pharmaceuticals Limited was born out of the dire need for an alternative to the hitherto existing chaotic distribution in the pharmaceutical supply chain. with the goal of addressing the gaps in the distribution value chain.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Sales Representative

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We’re looking for a results-driven Medical Sales Representative to drive product awareness, build strong client relationships, and grow sales across assigned territories. This is a job for Lagos residents.


Responsibilities


	Promote products to doctors, pharmacists, and healthcare providers.
	Manage orders, invoicing, and payment follow-ups.
	Drive product visibility across hospitals and pharmacies.
	Track market trends and competitor activity.
	Prepare and submit regular reports.
	Territory mappings ( Island and Mainland)


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a degree in sciences(Microbiology, Biochemistry, or related courses).
	1-3 years of work experience in Pharma sales or FMCG is advantageous.
	Strong communication and sales skills
	Proven ability to build relationships and close deals.
	Detail-oriented with basic computer skills.
	Knowledge of Lagos as a territory ( Island & Mainland)
	Candidates must reside in Lagos. If you do not reside in Lagos, do not apply
	Monthly float will also be provided.


Salary
N150,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Software Instructor",
  "description": "Fortesoft Systems Limited-NIIT is an IT training and consultancy organisation. We pride ourselves in providing thorough training on different technologies to our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Software Instructor

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Teach modern programming languages &amp; frameworks (Python, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Flutter, etc.).
	Deliver hands-on training, real-world projects, and coding workshops.
	Guide students on portfolio building, interview prep, and certification paths.
	Stay current with tech trends, AI tools, and industry practices.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 1 year of experience.
	Proficiency in coding, web/mobile development, cloud platforms (AWS, Azure), and DevOps tools.
	Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT API, TensorFlow, or LangChain is a plus.
	Strong communication skills and a passion for mentoring.
	Certifications in AWS, Azure, or Python/Java are an advantage.
	Python with Flask.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrniit1@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-30",

  },

Software Instructor Job at Fortesoft Systems Limited




        
    

        
        Fortesoft Systems Limited-NIIT is an IT training and consultancy organisation. We pride ourselves in providing thorough training on different technologies to our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Instructor

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Teach modern programming languages & frameworks (Python, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Flutter, etc.).
	Deliver hands-on training, real-world projects, and coding workshops.
	Guide students on portfolio building, interview prep, and certification paths.
	Stay current with tech trends, AI tools, and industry practices.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 1 year of experience.
	Proficiency in coding, web/mobile development, cloud platforms (AWS, Azure), and DevOps tools.
	Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT API, TensorFlow, or LangChain is a plus.
	Strong communication skills and a passion for mentoring.
	Certifications in AWS, Azure, or Python/Java are an advantage.
	Python with Flask.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Warehouse/ Store Support",
  "description": "Nemitt Pharmaceuticals Limited is an indigenous pharmaceutical company incorporated in July 1988 as a fully capitalized limited liability company with RC no 116 088 to among other activities, engage in the wholesale of Pharmaceutical products. Nemitt Pharmaceuticals Limited was born out of the dire need for an alternative to the hitherto existing chaotic distribution in the pharmaceutical supply chain. with the goal of addressing the gaps in the distribution value chain.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse/ Store Support

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are Pharmaceutical wholesale distributor looking for men who are passionate about the workings of a Warehouse to join in our team as Store/ warehouse staff to join our team.
	The team is responsible for receiving materials incoming from vendors, managing warehouse / store stock, replenishing shop floor stock, and maintaining accurate stock records.


Responsibilities


	Maintain and monitor the accuracy of inventory and timely replenishment.
	Ensure all documentation related to responsibility is accurately processed, distributed, and released to all concerned in a timely manner.
	Ensures all responsibilities are complied with any company policy, systems, and industry.
	Makes sure stock is arranged for easy physical count and stock-taking
	Replenish shop floor stock constantly, shelving and maintaining shelves
	Managed inbound and outbound process of product.
	Ensure the relevance and accuracy of all documentation relating to goods received and goods dispatched including labeling of all stock items
	Ensure that workings are in compliance with standards and policy
	Issues materials against authorized store requisition and keeps store.
	Report all warehouse activities on monthly for stock inventory, and pallets kept at warehouses both internal and external.
	To ensure physical stock takes correct in compared to the system and give an explanation for variances


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Diploma with at least 1year experience in retail, pharmacy or FMCG.
	Age range: 24- 39 years old.
	Men are encouraged to apply for gender balance
	Warehouse or retail store experience would be advantageous
	High level of Integrity.
	Physical strength to carry and move stock
	Good communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to pay attention to detail.
	Proximity to Surulere, Ojuelegba, and Yaba would be most preferred. Must live within or close to Surulere, Ojuelegba, Ajegunle, Apapa, Mushin, Fadeyi, Yaba or environ.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrnemitt@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Warehouse/ Store Support Job at Nemitt Pharmaceuticals Limited




        
    

        
        Nemitt Pharmaceuticals Limited is an indigenous pharmaceutical company incorporated in July 1988 as a fully capitalized limited liability company with RC no 116 088 to among other activities, engage in the wholesale of Pharmaceutical products. Nemitt Pharmaceuticals Limited was born out of the dire need for an alternative to the hitherto existing chaotic distribution in the pharmaceutical supply chain. with the goal of addressing the gaps in the distribution value chain.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse/ Store Support

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are Pharmaceutical wholesale distributor looking for men who are passionate about the workings of a Warehouse to join in our team as Store/ warehouse staff to join our team.
	The team is responsible for receiving materials incoming from vendors, managing warehouse / store stock, replenishing shop floor stock, and maintaining accurate stock records.


Responsibilities


	Maintain and monitor the accuracy of inventory and timely replenishment.
	Ensure all documentation related to responsibility is accurately processed, distributed, and released to all concerned in a timely manner.
	Ensures all responsibilities are complied with any company policy, systems, and industry.
	Makes sure stock is arranged for easy physical count and stock-taking
	Replenish shop floor stock constantly, shelving and maintaining shelves
	Managed inbound and outbound process of product.
	Ensure the relevance and accuracy of all documentation relating to goods received and goods dispatched including labeling of all stock items
	Ensure that workings are in compliance with standards and policy
	Issues materials against authorized store requisition and keeps store.
	Report all warehouse activities on monthly for stock inventory, and pallets kept at warehouses both internal and external.
	To ensure physical stock takes correct in compared to the system and give an explanation for variances


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Diploma with at least 1year experience in retail, pharmacy or FMCG.
	Age range: 24- 39 years old.
	Men are encouraged to apply for gender balance
	Warehouse or retail store experience would be advantageous
	High level of Integrity.
	Physical strength to carry and move stock
	Good communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to pay attention to detail.
	Proximity to Surulere, Ojuelegba, and Yaba would be most preferred. Must live within or close to Surulere, Ojuelegba, Ajegunle, Apapa, Mushin, Fadeyi, Yaba or environ.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Summary


	Summarize current financial status by collecting information; preparing balance sheet, profit and loss statement and other reports
	Document financial transactions
	Verify, allocate, post and reconcile transactions
	Examining expenses submitted by employees
	Process Receipts for incoming payments
	Analyze financial information and summarize financial status
	Contribute to a strong client relationship through positive interactions with client


Requirements


	B.Sc in Accounting or related fields
	Minimum of 1-2 years of experience in similar field
	Must be proficient in the use of Peach tree
	Advanced computer skills in MS Office, excel, accounting software and databases
	Thorough knowledge of basic accounting procedures and principles
	Accuracy and attention to detail
	Ability to communicate effectively with clients.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrniit1@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Junior Accountant Job at Fortesoft Systems Limited




        
    

        
        Fortesoft Systems Limited-NIIT is an IT training and consultancy organisation. We pride ourselves in providing thorough training on different technologies to our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Accountant

Job Location: Akowonjo, Oshodi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Summarize current financial status by collecting information; preparing balance sheet, profit and loss statement and other reports
	Document financial transactions
	Verify, allocate, post and reconcile transactions
	Examining expenses submitted by employees
	Process Receipts for incoming payments
	Analyze financial information and summarize financial status
	Contribute to a strong client relationship through positive interactions with client


Requirements


	B.Sc in Accounting or related fields
	Minimum of 1-2 years of experience in similar field
	Must be proficient in the use of Peach tree
	Advanced computer skills in MS Office, excel, accounting software and databases
	Thorough knowledge of basic accounting procedures and principles
	Accuracy and attention to detail
	Ability to communicate effectively with clients.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
